mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id AS "tenantId", user_id AS "userId", provider, status, credential_json AS "credentialJson", metadata_json AS "metadataJson", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM auth_state WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth_state WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_state(tenant_id, user_id, provider, status, credential_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{state.tenantId}, #{state.userId}, #{state.provider}, #{state.status}, #{state.credentialJson}, #{state.metadataJson}, #{state.createdAt}, #{state.updatedAt})

INSERT INTO boss_qr_login_session( qr_session_id, tenant_id, user_id, chat_session_id, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{state.qrSessionId}, #{state.tenantId}, #{state.userId}, #{state.chatSessionId}, #{state.expiresAt}, #{state.createdAt}, #{state.updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (qr_session_id) DO UPDATE SET tenant_id = EXCLUDED.tenant_id, user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id, chat_session_id = EXCLUDED.chat_session_id, expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT qr_session_id AS "qrSessionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", user_id AS "userId", chat_session_id AS "chatSessionId", expires_at AS "expiresAt", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM boss_qr_login_session WHERE qr_session_id = #{qrSessionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM boss_qr_login_session WHERE qr_session_id = #{qrSessionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId}
